parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nomic-embed-text', input: $('Normalize Context Request').first().json.retrieval_query || $('Normalize Context Request').first().json.query, truncate: true }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: false, error: $json.error, query: $json.query, project_slug: $json.project_slug ?? null, top_k: $json.top_k, retrieval: { strategy: $json.retrieval_strategy, project_match_count: 0, general_match_count: 0, memory_count: 0, strongest_similarity: null, similarity_threshold: 0.72, empty: true }, context_bundle: null, sources: [], context_preview: '', session: { turn_count_before: Array.isArray($json.session_turns) ? $json.session_turns.length : 0, history_used: Array.isArray($json.session_turns) ? $json.session_turns.length > 0 : false, stored: false } } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(project_rows) ORDER BY project_rows.distance)
    FROM (
      SELECT id, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
        ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) AS similarity,
        (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS distance
      FROM memories
      WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
        AND $2::text IS NOT NULL
        AND NULLIF(COALESCE(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), '') = $2::text
      ORDER BY distance
      LIMIT $3::int
    ) project_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS project_memories,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(general_rows) ORDER BY general_rows.distance)
    FROM (
      SELECT id, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
        ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) AS similarity,
        (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS distance
      FROM memories
      WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
        AND COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), '') = ''
      ORDER BY distance
      LIMIT $3::int
    ) general_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS general_memories,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(all_rows) ORDER BY all_rows.distance)
    FROM (
      SELECT id, title, source, category, content, metadata_json,
        COALESCE(NULLIF(metadata_json->>'project_slug', ''), NULL) AS project_slug,
        ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 6) AS similarity,
        (embedding <=> $1::vector) AS distance
      FROM memories
      WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL
      ORDER BY distance
      LIMIT $3::int
    ) all_rows
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS all_memories;
